notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery doubles (16) on a fly ball to left fielder Cooper Ingle. Miguel Vargas scores. Colson Montgomery to 3rd. Colson Montgomery advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by left fielder Cooper Ingle.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery doubles (16) on a fly ball to left fielder Cooper Ingle. Miguel Vargas scores. Colson Montgomery to 3rd. Colson Montgomery advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by left fielder Cooper Ingle.

notableEvents.label: Kahlil Watson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kahlil Watson grounds into a double play, first baseman Miguel Vargas to shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. Kahlil Watson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry grounds out, shortstop Chase Meidroth to first baseman Miguel Vargas.
